creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 177867
patch for version 0.7

Update devel/include-what-you-use to version 0.7, which supports clang 3.9, adds mappings for Qt 5.4 and various other fixes and enhancements.

This update introduces pkg-plist.

Builds fine in poudriere on 10.1-i386 and 12.0-amd64
